_comment_openai_api_key: Loaded from OPENAI_API_KEY in the environment or .env file. Required for any OpenAI-backed mode.
_comment_runtime_mode: Primary preset selector: deterministic, mixed, or openai_storyteller.
_comment_runtime_mode_deterministic: Use deterministic scene narration, deterministic dialogue intent, and deterministic dialogue rendering.
_comment_runtime_mode_mixed: Use the component switches below to mix deterministic and OpenAI components.
_comment_runtime_mode_openai_storyteller: Use OpenAI for scene narration, dialogue intent, and dialogue rendering.
_comment_openai_model: Model name used by every OpenAI component in the selected runtime mode.
_comment_use_openai_scene_provider: When true in mixed mode, scene narration comes from OpenAI instead of the deterministic narrator.
_comment_use_openai_dialogue_intent_adap: When true in mixed mode, dialogue intent interpretation comes from OpenAI instead of the deterministic adapter.
_comment_use_openai_dialogue_renderer: When true in mixed mode, NPC dialogue realization comes from OpenAI instead of deterministic dialogue rendering.
_comment_use_openai_storyteller_mode: Legacy compatibility knob for the full OpenAI storyteller preset. Prefer runtime_mode = "openai_storyteller".
